---
title: 'OSIM Meetup: Data Usage Agreements'
categories: OSIM Meetup

event:
  card_description: "Discussion on data usage agreements and legal aspects of data sharing"
  start_date: 2025-03-14
  time: "14:00 CET"
  format:
    type: "Hybrid"
    details: "In-person & Online"
  language:
    primary: "English"
    primary-code: "en"

instructors: []

presenters: []

contact: 
    name: "OSC team"
    email: "osc@lmu.de"

organizers:
  - name: "Julian Lange"
  - name: "Luisa Jiménez-Soto"

host:
  - name: Open Science Initiative in Medicine
    abbreviation: OSIM
  
template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---


## Event Details

**Date & Time:** 14 March 2025, 14:00 CET
